channel.title: Branding on Tylers New and Improved Website
channel.description: Recent content in Branding on Tylers New and Improved Website

item.title: Tyler's Bookshelf
item.description:
A Look Back #

I miss the old web.

This is my attempt at bringing it back, bit by bit.

I remember my first learning about web development in highschool. I took a web development course and learned the foundations of the web– no nonsense. Strictly learning about HTML, CSS, and just a dash of Javascript, every student was an author, a creator, a developer for the web.
